I'm a Conversational AI Chatbot with Contextual Memory! I can remember our past conversations, track topics we discuss, analyze sentiment, and provide context-aware responses. Try asking me something!

• Remember our past conversations
• Search through conversation history
• Analyze sentiment and intent
• Provide context-aware responses

What would you like to explore?
Sure! I'm equipped with contextual memory, sentiment analysis, intent detection, and conversation summarization. Just start talking and I'll learn from our conversation!

patterns: What do you know about me?
